Narrative: The Khavda Renewable Energy Park has successfully produced 221081.73 MW of renewable energy over the reporting period.
Financial performance remains solid with total revenue tracking at 99.49 Crores INR.
Operations experienced 4 high-risk weather days, resulting in an estimated 1.45 Crores INR of revenue exposed to weather-related risks.
The facility continues to drive massive decarbonization, avoiding 181286.99 Tons of CO2 equivalent emissions.
AI-driven forecasting models remain accurate with an average predictive error of 2.07%.
Dynamic predictive models indicate a generally favorable operating environment, with isolated generation drops correlated strictly to transient cloud cover and heavy rainfall.
